---
title: "Workflow Overview"
format: html
---

## Workflow Diagram

::: terra-card
<div class="responsive-embed">
  <iframe
    src="https://miro.com/app/live-embed/uXjVGWtDRtw=/?focusWidget=3458764654571379646&embedMode=view_only_without_ui&embedId=888574849578"
    allow="fullscreen; clipboard-read; clipboard-write"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>
:::

### Crediting Baseline Number

::: terra-card
<div class="responsive-embed">
  <iframe
    src="https://miro.com/app/live-embed/uXjVGWtDRtw=/?focusWidget=3458764654571379385&amp;embedMode=view_only_without_ui&amp;embedId=888574849578" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" allow="fullscreen; clipboard-read; clipboard-write" allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>
:::
